---
title: "Projects"
---

## Atlas of Urban Fragility

*Coming soon — Cox's Bazar, Kabul, Mosul, and Goma through the lens of service-population alignment.*

::: {.callout-tip}
This portfolio is under active construction. The flagship fragility atlas will be published here over the next 10 days.
:::

## Future work

More projects will appear here over time — urban network analysis, transit equity, and other topics in urban informatics.
